hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath' | { read -r f; echo "$f" | grep -qE '\.(ts|tsx|js|jsx)$' && cd /home/user/AI-Construction-Intelligence-Platform && npm run build 2>&1 | tail -5; } 2>/dev/null || true
jq -r '.tool_input.command' | grep -q 'git commit' && echo '{"systemMessage":"✅ Commit feito — push em andamento"}' || true
